articles.title: Sassuolo gets Cagliari into trouble: first Garcia and then Pinamonti overturn Esposito's penalty
articles.summary: Sassuolo wins against Cagliari 2-1. After the Sardinians took the lead in the first half with the penalty converted by Sebastiano Esposito, in the second half Fabio Grosso's team with Garcia and Pinamonti took the lead and rose to 42 points.
